ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES dataset_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., census, survey, administrative record) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the source */,
  "is_reliable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the source is reliable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual data value */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data value belongs to */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_categories_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
